title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 84.410 - Board of police — quorum — effective time of regulations
text:
84.410.  Board of police — quorum — effective time of regulations. — The majority of the board shall constitute a quorum for the transaction of business.  No rule or regulation of the board shall take effect until fifteen days after final action on it by the board unless otherwise specified by the board.  No action shall be taken by the board unless three concurring votes are cast.
(RSMo 1939 § 7649, A.L. 1943 p. 727 § 7650) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 7507; 1919 § 8918; 1909 § 9770
